=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 5:14-5:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const pipe(MyUnion) = Schema.Union(
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
)


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 5:14-5:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion: Schema.Union<[Schema.Literal<["A"]>, Schema.Literal<["B"]>]> = Schema.Union(
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
)


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 5:14-5:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion = () => Schema.Union(
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
)


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Make Schema opaque" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 5:14-5:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion_ = Schema.Union(
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
)
export type MyUnion = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof MyUnion_>;
export type MyUnionEncoded = Schema.Schema.Encoded<typeof MyUnion_>;
export type MyUnionContext = Schema.Schema.Context<typeof MyUnion_>;
export const MyUnion: Schema.Schema<MyUnion, MyUnionEncoded, MyUnionContext> = MyUnion_;


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Make Schema opaque with namespace" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 5:14-5:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion_ = Schema.Union(
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
)
export interface MyUnion extends Schema.Schema.Type<typeof MyUnion_> { }
export namespace MyUnion {
    export type Encoded = Schema.Schema.Encoded<typeof MyUnion_>;
    export type Context = Schema.Schema.Context<typeof MyUnion_>;
}
export const MyUnion: Schema.Schema<MyUnion, MyUnion.Encoded, MyUnion.Context> = MyUnion_;
